stemHtml: The RNAV 10 specification is based on having long-range navigation systems. These include inertial systems where the actual navigation performance degrades over time. How can the RNAV 10 navigation capability time for these systems be extended?

options.b: Automatic updating using DME and VOR stations
options.c: Installing a performance monitoring and alerting system
options.d: Programming a lateral offset in the navigation computer
